data.headline: Your New Chapter Starts Here
data.tagline: Finding Your Place to Call Home
data.body: We're Rachel and David — a husband-and-wife team who believe buying or selling a home should feel exciting, not overwhelming. You'll tell us what matters most, and we'll find a home that fits your life.

data.title: How We Help
data.subtitle: People-first service, every step of the way.

items.title: First-Time Buyer Guidance
items.description: You'll never feel lost — we walk you through every step of the homebuying process with patience and clarity.

items.title: Home Staging Advice
items.description: We'll help you present your home at its best so it sells quickly and for the right price.

items.title: Free Market Analysis
items.description: Know exactly what your home is worth before you list — no pressure, no obligation.

items.title: Neighborhood Tours
items.description: You'll discover communities that match your lifestyle through personalized neighborhood walkthroughs.

items.title: Relocation Support
items.description: Moving to Charlotte? We'll help you find the neighborhood, schools, and community that feel like home.

items.title: Bilingual Service
items.description: We serve clients in both English and Korean, making the process clear and comfortable for every family.

steps.title: Share Your Story
steps.description: You'll tell us what matters most — neighborhood, space, budget, lifestyle. We listen first.

steps.title: Find Your Match
steps.description: We'll search with intention, showing you homes that genuinely fit your life — not just your list.

steps.title: Welcome Home
steps.description: You'll step across the threshold of a place that feels like yours. We'll be there every step of the way.

data.title: Happy Homeowners
data.subtitle: Families we've been honored to serve in Charlotte.

items.client_quote: Rachel and David found us our dream home in two weeks. We felt so cared for throughout the whole process.
As first-time buyers we were nervous, but they made us feel so supported. Couldn't have done it without them.
They sold our home in 6 days over asking price. Absolutely incredible team.
Patient, kind, and always available. They truly care about people, not just transactions.

items.text: Rachel and David treated us like family from day one. They found us a home that checked every box — including some we didn't know we had. The whole process felt warm and human.
We relocated from Seoul and knew nobody in Charlotte. The Kim team made the entire transition feel manageable and even exciting. Having Korean-speaking agents was a huge comfort for my parents.
I've worked with agents before who felt like salespeople. Rachel and David felt like trusted advisors. They were honest when a home wasn't right for us, and that built so much trust.

data.title: What's Your Home Worth?
data.subtitle: Find out in minutes — completely free.
data.description: Enter your address below and we'll send you a personalized market analysis based on recent sales in your neighborhood. **100% free, no obligation, no pressure.**

data.title: About Rachel & David
bio: We're Rachel and David Kim — a husband-and-wife real estate team based in Charlotte, NC. Together, we've helped over 500 families buy and sell homes across the greater Charlotte area over the past 12 years.

We started in real estate because we believe every family deserves a home that truly fits their life. Not just the square footage on paper, but the feeling of walking through the front door and knowing you're home.

Outside of real estate, you'll find us hiking the trails around Lake Norman, cooking Korean recipes passed down from David's grandmother, or cheering on our kids at weekend soccer games. Charlotte isn't just where we work — it's where we live and love.

thank_you.heading: Thank You!
thank_you.subheading: Your Home Value Report Is On Its Way
thank_you.body: We're putting together a personalized market analysis just for you. You'll hear from us soon — usually within 24 hours.
thank_you.disclaimer: This report is a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) and is not a licensed appraisal.
